name: Social Proof Bar
description: A compact social proof bar showing aggregate ratings, review counts, and trust badges from platforms like Google, Yelp, and Facebook. Supports animated number reveals.
whenToUse: Use near the hero section or above the fold to quickly establish trust with aggregate review data.

props.name: platforms
props.description: List of platforms to show badges for (e.g., 'google', 'yelp')

props.name: animated
props.description: Whether to animate numbers on appearance
